problem id: 3c9b8e0e
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (ROT(7) AND NOT SHR(6)) XOR NOT SHL(4)

examples:
  11111110 -> 01100011
  01001000 -> 01011011
  00100100 -> 10101101
  01110000 -> 11000111
  10001110 -> 01011010
  10110010 -> 10000110
  10011000 -> 00110011
  00011111 -> 10000000

query: 01100111
predicted answer: 00111101
